V-M-033.checks: Active MyGRACE indexes, per-entity files, README handoff, and verification surfaces must match the current Full Tunnel architecture.
V-M-033.commands: python3 -m xml.etree.ElementTree docs/graph-index.xml docs/plan-index.xml docs/verification-index.xml; mygrace lint; cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY=dpFmfSVqfdAK3yx5MQV6Tcv35RZuw5MzaH0yhxJ01q0= PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' --collect-only -q

module-checks.check-1: All active XML files parse successfully.
module-checks.check-2: graph-index entries have matching docs/modules files.
module-checks.check-3: verification-index entries have matching docs/verification files.
module-checks.check-4: Active phase steps do not route agents to removed modules unless marked archived or superseded.

scenarios.scenario-1: Backend pytest collection is clean after obsolete routing tests are archived or rewritten.
scenarios.scenario-2: An active V-M entry points to tests that import removed split-tunnel modules.
scenarios.scenario-3: README or handoff docs require non-existent monolithic GRACE files.

execution-evidence.local-check-1: Active XML parse: 103 files parsed, 0 failures.
execution-evidence.local-check-2: Dependency CrossLink audit: 0 missing DEPENDS CrossLinks.
execution-evidence.local-check-3: Index count/file audit: 0 errors across graph modules, plan phases, and verification entries.
execution-evidence.local-check-5: Backend pytest collection: 106 tests collected, 0 collection errors.
execution-evidence.live-vps-check-1: No live VPS evidence required for Phase-21 because no runtime, deployment, install, or topology files changed.
execution-evidence.live-vps-check-2: Future Phase-22 and Phase-26 gates must add live VPS or restore-target evidence for backup, restore, and emergency relocation readiness.
